Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ProfilePasswordPolicy

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ProfilePasswordPolicy
public class ProfilePasswordPolicy extends Metadata

Java class for ProfilePasswordPolicy complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ProfilePasswordPolicy">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="forgotPasswordRedirect" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lockoutInterval" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="maxLoginAttempts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="minimumPasswordLength" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="minimumPasswordLifetime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="obscure" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="passwordComplexity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="passwordExpiration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="passwordHistory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="passwordQuestion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="profile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
